title: Build the pure Demo Clone allowlist converter
objective: Implement a pure, deterministic allowlist converter for the approved owner-only Demo Clone data contract without mutating the Built-in Demo.
acceptanceCriteria: Build a fresh object graph using an explicit allowlist; do not mutate or deep-copy the Demo.
Produce an owner-only trip containing the complete versioned three-day itinerary.
Reset every Checklist item to incomplete and clear its assignee or assign it to the current owner.
Generate a new room ID and new place and checklist IDs; the Demo room ID must never become the real trip ID.
Derive retry-stable IDs deterministically from operationId and the template source key.

Exclude fictional members, expenses, settlements, tickets, attachments, Storage paths, Demo IDs, Demo-only root fields, guidance, example URLs, DEMO order numbers, old timestamps, audit or completion state, and credential-like data.
Preserve Built-in Demo immutability and never add the Demo to myTrips or Offline Cache.
Represent copied places as cleaned text-only entries explicitly marked unverified, without trusted place_id or verified routing metadata.
